articles.author: Matt Grossman
articles.title: Inflation Slowed to 3.5% in June, as Americans Got a Break From Gasoline Prices - WSJ
articles.description: But oil prices have surged so far this month after a collapse in the Iran ceasefire
articles.content:
Americans got a break on 
inflation last month, with better deals at the gas station and cooler price increases across much of the economy.Consumer prices were up 3.5% in June from a year earlier, b… [+586 chars]
